task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "安装依赖库（SpeechRecognition, pydub, ffmpeg）"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "加载MP3音频文件"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "将MP3音频文件转换为WAV格式以提高兼容性"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "初始化语音识别器"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "从WAV文件中读取音频数据"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "使用Google语音识别API提取音频中的文字"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "将提取的文字保存到文本文件中"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "处理可能的异常（如网络问题、音频质量问题）"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "建议优化音频质量（降噪、标准化音量等）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "分片处理长音频以适应API限制"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "定义正则表达式模式用于标题检测"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "使用正则表达式检测并标记大标题和小标题"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "使用jieba提取重要关键词"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "对提取的关键词进行去重和排序"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "将结构化文本输出为Markdown格式"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "dependency"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "convert"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "initialize"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "loadAudio"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "recognizeSpeech"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "saveText"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node8", "type": "handleErrors"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "suggestImprovements"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node10", "type": "processLongAudio"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node11", "type": "defineRegexPatterns"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "detectAndMarkTitles"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node13", "type": "extractKeywords"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node14", "type": "deduplicateAndSortKeywords"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node15", "type": "outputStructuredText"}, {"source": "Node14", "target": "Node15", "type": "includeKeywordsInOutput"}]}
